name: Legacy of Lightyears RPG
description:
Pictured above: Spaceship maintenance personnel at a spaceport in a large USE city on the historical expoplanet Elysia, Alpha Centauri A core system in the Orion Spur, circa 2278.

Art: https://starfieldwiki.net/wiki/File:SF-concept-New_Atlantis.jpg

My universe has RPG potential, so here it is. You can choose any time period / era in the timeline (2027-2278) (Dawn of FTL Era, Early Solar System Colonization & United Nations (UN) Era, Interstellar Era, Dawn of the United Systems of Earth (USE) Era, Project Eden / Terraforming Era, and Golden Age Era), you can be human or manimal (just use one of your furry personas for that), and you can be any role you want (Delivery courier, researcher, astronaut, etc.).

Legacy of Lightyears bots:

David Miles (2027): https://janitorai.com/characters/22bd1092-e6c2-41f8-9eed-2b477c970e9c_character-aerospace-engineer-david-miles

Luna Howler (2032): https://janitorai.com/characters/e8eda724-fbdd-4a6d-a256-91089997bfa5_character-phoenix-1-luna-howler

Ricardo Alvarez (2054): https://janitorai.com/characters/99a4e384-394c-46ad-93d3-608fbafff80d_character-titan-researcher-ricardo-alvarez

Julian Tremblay (2089): https://janitorai.com/characters/43c0ccd9-6af3-4c99-9840-0426db428ea9_character-exomoon-colonist-julian-tremblay

Angelo Solari (2278): https://janitorai.com/characters/0996fa60-d12a-43c2-b587-b5f9d424c8ff_character-orion-express-interstellar-courier-angelo-solari

Legacy of Lightyears Timeline (Pre 2027-2278): https://janitorai.com/characters/4d4c1450-df5b-49a6-9ef6-72f195742cf6_character-legacy-of-lightyears-timeline

Legacy of Lightyears RPG (2027-2278): This one!

Notes: Alright y’all, here’s the usual. Please give some critique or feedback if ya want to, especially with this being my first RPG bot. Also I’m mostly making bots for myself, but I’ll just make some public if I feel like it and if I think it’s good enough to at least share. I’m not one to gatekeep peak after all... This bot’s actually for you guys, so enjoy.
